title: Dummy Post: Latency Budgeting for Edge Deployment
excerpt: A final dummy post to expand the dataset for scrolling, sorting, and related-post behavior on larger collections.

content.value: Latency budgets become easier to manage once every stage of the pipeline is measured independently instead of hiding behind a single average.

| Stage | Budget |
|---|---|
| Capture | 8 ms |
| Preprocessing | 12 ms |
| Inference | 20 ms |
| Postprocessing | 6 ms |
